generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T GENTIANA CRUCIATA. Gentiana cruciata, Linn. Natural order , Gentianaceæ. Common name (Germ.), Kreuz-enzian. Preparation , Tincture of the root. Authorities. 1 , Frolich, effects of chewing two or three roots, swallowing the juice, Watzke's provings, Oest. Zeit. f. Hom., 1, pt. 3, p. 132; 2 , Gerstel, a teaspoonful of tincture, and afterwards a tablespoonful of the fresh juice, ibid.; 3 , Reisinger took 10 drops of tincture daily, in the morning, gradually increasing the dose to 60 drops, after four weeks; afterward, he took half an ounce of the juice, ibid.; 4 , Schwarz took 1st dil. daily, increasing to 40 drops at a dose, ibid.; 5 , Wachtel took tincture, began with 10 drops a day, increasing 10 drops a dose to 80 drops; after a month, began with 50 drops and increased to half an ounce a day after twenty days, and after a week took 50, 80, 100, and 120-drop doses of tincture, ibid.; 6 , Wurstel took a spoonful of fresh juice, ibid.; 7 , Zlatarovich took 1/2 and 1 ounce of tincture, and afterwards 3 spoonfuls of juice, ibid.; 8 , a girl took 2 and afterward 3 spoonfuls of juice, ibid.; 9 , Wurmb took large doses of tincture and juice, ibid.; 10 , Watzke took 2 spoonfuls of juice; 10 a , same prover took 5 to 10 drops of tincture, and afterwards, every day, 10 drops of the dilutions from 6th to 3d, and afterwards 12th dil., repeatedly, ibid.; 11 , Watzke's brother took 2 spoonfuls of juice, ibid. MIND. ► Weeping mood, with disinclination to talk, [3] . ► Very peculiar apprehensiveness, and acceleration and difficulty of breathing, swelling of the temporal veins and feeling of pressure in the temporal region; on reading, the print seemed indistinct, as if covered with a veil, [7] . HEAD. ► Confusion and Vertigo. ► Confusion of the head, [1] . ► Confusion of the head; whirling, [6] . ► Vertigo, [1] . ► General Head. ► A constrictive sensation in the head on sitting a long time, [7] . ► Sensitiveness of the whole head and whole brain after dinner, aggravated by violent motion of the head, [10a] . ► Forehead. ► Pressure in the forehead, [1] , [5] . ► Temples. ► Swelling of the temporal veins and feeling of pressure in the temporal region, [7] . [10.] ► A pressing pressure in both temples, [5] . ► A sudden stitch through the left temple (after six hours), [10a] . ► Vertex. ► Distressing tension and at times a transient jerking pain in the region of the vertex; the tension soon became a very acute constant pressure, aggravated by exerting the eyes or constant thought, [10a] . EYE. ► Sensation as though the eyes were lying deep within the orbits, [8] . ► A pressing inward sensation in the right eye, [2] . ► On reading, the print seemed indistinct, as if covered with a veil, [7] . EAR. ► Acute drawing in the mastoid process behind the ear (second day), [10a] . NOSE. ► Frequent sneezing, [11] . MOUTH. ► Two aphthous ulcers on the margin of the lower lip, on either side of the frænum, [6] . ► Flow of saliva increased, [3] . [20.] ► Astringent taste, [3] . THROAT. ► Objective. ► Slight redness and distressing sensation of constriction within the throat, so that swallowing was very difficult; he was constantly obliged to hawk up tenacious and firmly adherent mucus, [5] . ► Subjective. ► The throat seemed too tightly constricted; was frequently obliged to hawk and expectorate, [6] . ► Rawness in the throat, causing frequent hawking, [3] . ► Scraping and rawness in the throat, [2] , [5] . ► Scraping and rawness in the throat, with constriction of swallowing, [6] . ► Uvula and Tonsils. ► The posterior portion of the palate, both tonsils, and upper part of the pharynx were very deeply red; this symptom was peculiar in that it was intermittent, and for some days it appeared and disappeared at certain times in the day, [6] . ► Transient stitches in the tonsils, [3] . ► Scraping in the soft palate, throat, and halfway down the sophagus (after two hours), [6] . ► Swallowing. ► Swallowing somewhat difficult, [3] . [30.] ► Swallowing difficult, with an anxious constrictive sensation, and a slight but uniform redness of the arch of the palate, uvula, and posterior wall of the pharynx, [5] . ► External Throat. ► Violent pulsation in the carotids, [5] . STOMACH. ► Appetite. ► Increased appetite, [1] . ► Loss of appetite, [3] . ► Thirst. ► Unusual thirst, [7] . ► Eructation. ► Eructations of air, tasting of the tincture, [3] . ► Frequent eructations of air and of an acid fluid, tasting of the Gentian, immediately, [10] . ► Many eructations of air, relieving the tension in the abdomen and the headache (after three hours), [6] . ► Acid eructations; and after an hour, three sour, watery vomitings (after two hours), [6] . ► Nausea and Vomiting. ► Great nausea, with inclination to lie down, [10a] . [40.] ► Great inclination to vomit, and constriction in the throat, [11] . ► Vomiting, after half a hour, preceded by great nausea, [11] . ► Violent nausea, with vomiting (after 1/2 oz. of the juice), [3] . ► Vomiting, with some difficulty, a small quantity of mucus of an acid odor, of an intensely bitter taste, leaving a scraping and rawness in the throat (after one hour and a half), [10] . ► Violent difficult vomiting of mucus; repeated, after a short time, in the street, [11] . ► Stomach. ► Movings about in the stomach, and afterwards in the abdomen, disappearing on walking, [6] . ► A sensation in the stomach and sophagus as though he had swallowed a morsel of hot food followed by cold water; this sensation lasted the whole day, was aggravated by eating, and relieved by drinking fresh water, [9] . ► Burning in the stomach, [7] . ► Sensation of fulness in the stomach, with constant inclination to eructate (after one hour), [6] . ► Pressure in the stomach, [1] . [50.] ► Pressure in the stomach recurring several times during the day, [2] . ► Sensation of pressure in the stomach, as if there was a stone in it, with inclination to vomit (after half an ounce), [5] . ► Sensation of pressing inward in the pit of the stomach, soon, [10a] . ABDOMEN. ► Umbilical. ► Sensitive, griping, sore sensation in the umbilical region, aggravated after dinner, not unlike slight colic, frequently returning, less when sitting and lying, and worse when standing and walking and after smoking, obliging him to bend the body forward; therewith the umbilicus seemed to be drawn inward, [4] . ► General Abdomen. ► Movings about in the intestines, with slight headache, followed by copious pasty evacuation, soon, [6] . ► Distension of the abdomen, with feeling of heaviness in the stomach and frequent empty eructations, without inclination to vomit, [6] . ► Great distension of the abdomen, which disappeared while walking slowly (after two hours), [6] . ► Fulness and tightness in the abdomen, [7] . ► Frequent passage of offensive flatus, [10] . ► Slight pain in the abdomen, [10] . [60.] ► Tension in the abdomen, with great inclination to vomit, soon, [10] . ► Distressing tension in the abdomen, only relieved after a profuse pasty evacuation, [6] . ► Feeling of distension and constriction in the abdomen, [8] . ► Iliac Region. ► A dragging in the right inguinal region, as if something would protrude from the inguinal region, always relieved by sitting and lying; on the last day of the proving, he noticed, on violent sneezing, a protrusion in this place of the size of a hazelnut, which was particularly sensitive (as this symptom could have no other cause than the medicine, he discontinued the proving, but the symptom disappeared only after three weeks; a bandage was worn on account of this protrusion), [4] . RECTUM AND ANUS. ► Constant violent urging to stool, followed by three watery evacuations (after three hours), [11] . STOOL. ► Pasty diarrha several times, [10] . ► Three liquid evacuations, preceded by some griping pains (after some hours), [8] . ► Free pasty evacuation, without the usual itching in the anus, [7] . SEXUAL ORGANS. ► Menstruation three days earlier than usual, during which there was a headache, as if the head were too full, with feeling of distension in the skull, relieved during rest, and aggravated by motion, preventing sleep for a long time, [8] . RESPIRATORY ORGANS. ► Hoarseness; the voice gave out in the middle of his speech, [5] . [70.] ► Frequent attacks of hoarseness and sensitiveness of the throat, [5] . ► Frequent expectoration, [6] . NECK AND BACK. ► Drawing and jerking along the right side of the neck, extending to the shoulder, [10a] . ► Drawing in the cervical muscles, extending to the ears, aggravated by turning the head, an uneasiness so that he could not remain long in one position, [7] . ► Repeated drawings in the cervical muscles, [7] . ► Tension in the lumbar region, [8] . EXTREMITIES IN GENERAL. ► Slight jerklike drawing in the extremities, [7] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Distressing drawing in the right shoulder, lasting several minutes, [10a] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► Cramplike pains in the soles of the feet, [7] . GENERAL SYMPTOMS. ► Faintness, [7] . [80.] ► Uneasiness, [7] . ► The whole body seemed very much affected and all the nerves seemed tense, so that walking was difficult, [6] . SKIN. ► Creeping over the body, as from fleas, in the evening, [7] . SLEEP. ► Uneasy sleep, [5] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( After dinner ), Sensitiveness of head. ► ( Eating ), Sensation in the stomach, etc. ► ( Exerting eyes ), Tension in the region of vertex. ► ( Motion ), Headache during menstruation. ► ( Violent motion ), Sensitiveness of head. ► ( On long sitting ), Constrictive sensation in head. ► ( After smoking ), Sensation in umbilical region. ► ( Standing ), Sensation in umbilical region. ► ( Constant thought ), Tension in vertex. ► ( Walking ), Sensation in umbilical region. ► Amelioration. ► ( Open air ), The symptoms. ► ( Eructation ), Tension in abdomen, etc. ► ( Lying ), Sensation in the umbilical region; dragging in inguinal region. ► ( Rest ), Headache during menstruation. ► ( Sitting ), Sensation in umbilical region; dragging in inguinal region. ► ( Walking ), Movings about in stomach, etc. ► ( Walking slowly ), Distension of abdomen. ► ( Warm soup ), Symptoms generally. ► ( Drinking fresh water ), Sensation in stomach, etc. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main
Clinical: Diarrhœa; Dyspepsia; Dysphagia; Hernia; Hoarseness; Stiff-neck; Stomach, affections of; Throat, sore

Hoarseness; voice gave out in middle of speech. Frequent attacks of hoarseness and sensitiveness of the throat. Distressing drawing in r. shoulder lasting several minutes. Cramp-like pains in soles of feet. Copyright © Médi-T ® 2000 Main.

keynotes.text: "G. cruciata," says the Treasury of Botany, "has been invested with imaginary virtues, because its leaves grow in the form of a cross; it has been recommended in hydrophobia." Its virtues are not all imaginary, and its reputation as a remedy for hydrophobia is partly justified in the provings. The proving of Gent. cruc. (by Watzke and ten others) developed a number of striking symptoms in the throat and digestive tract. Movings about in stomach and abdomen. Pressure in the stomach as if a stone was in it, with inclination to vomit. All the symptoms of right inguinal hernia occurred in one prover. A peculiar sense of apprehensiveness; faintness; uneasiness. One prover felt as if all the nerves were tense, so that walking was difficult. Creeping over the body as from fleas in the evening. The symptoms are after eating. > From warm soup; from drinking fresh water; in open air.

_raw: Compare: Gent. lut.; Lyc. (> from warm drink); Bry., Puls., Ab. n., &c. (pressure in stomach as from a stone); Kal. bi. (tenacious mucus in throat).

mental_emotional.text: Weeping mood, with disinclination to talk. Very peculiar apprehensiveness, and acceleration and difficulty of breathing, swelling of the temporal veins and feeling of pressure in the temporal region; on reading, print seemed indistinct and as if covered with a veil.

head.text: Confusion and whirling. Sensitiveness of whole head and whole brain after dinner, by violent motion of head. Swelling of temporal veins and feeling of pressure in temporal region. Sudden stitch through l. temple. Distressing tension, and at times transient jerking in region of vertex; tension soon became a very acute constant pressure, by exerting eyes, or constant thought.

eyes.text: Sensation as though eyes were lying deep in orbit; piercing inward sensation in r. eye. Print indistinct as if covered with a veil.

mouth_throat.text: Two aphthous ulcers on margin of lower lip on either side of frenum. Flow of saliva increased. Slight redness and distressing sensation of constriction within the throat, so that swallowing is very difficult; constantly obliged to hawk up tenacious and firmly adherent mucus. Rawness and scraping, causing frequent hawking; with constriction on swallowing. Intermittent, deep redness of fauces. Stitches in tonsils. Swallowing difficult; with an anxious constrictive sensation; slight redness of fauces.

stomach_abdomen.text: Appetite increased; or lost. Acid eructations; watery vomiting. Great nausea, with inclination to lie down. Vomiting, with some difficulty, a small quantity of mucus of an acid odour, intensely bitter, leaving a scraping and rawness in throat. Movings about in stomach, and afterwards in abdomen, disappeared on walking. Sensation in stomach and œsophagus as though he had swallowed a morsel of hot food followed by cold water; lasted the whole day, by eating; > by drinking fresh water. Burning; fulness; pressure in stomach. Pressure in stomach as if a stone were in it, with inclination to vomit. Sensation of pressing inward in pit of stomach. Sensitive, griping, sore sensation in umbilical region, after dinner, > sitting and lying, standing, walking, and after" smoking, obliging him to bend forward; therewith umbilicus seemed to be drawn inward. Movings about in intestines with slight headache, followed by copious pasty evacuation. Distension; fulness; tightness; constriction in abdomen. Dragging in r. inguinal region with feeling of protrusion, > sitting or lying; on violent sneezing actual protrusion occurred, size of hazel-nut, very sensitive.

stool_rectum.text: Constant violent urging, followed by three watery evacuations. Pasty diarrhœa. Free pasty stools without the usual itching in anus.

female.text: Menstruation three days earlier than usual, during which there was a headache as if head too full, with feeling of distension in the skull, > during rest and by motion, preventing sleep for a long time.

back.text: Drawing and jerking along r. side of neck, extending to shoulder. Drawing in cervical muscles, extending to ears, by turning head, an uneasiness so that he could not remain long in one position. Repeated drawings in cervical muscles. Tension in lumbar region.
